name: Thick'n Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Whole tomatoes, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, heat the olive oil until hot.
2. Add vegetables (onions, carrots, celery) and sauté on medium heat until wilted.
3. Cover and cook for 3 more minutes.
4. Add water, broth, adobo, and Sazon seasoning; bring to a boil.
5. Stir in barley and lentils; simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Add cooked chicken and tomatoes; heat through.
7. Serve 6 - 8 people.
